replies.msg:
Tiers are decided by the number of “Tier Points” points a Sync Pair gets:

Tier Points = Stat Points + Move Effect Points + Adjustment Points

Each term is defined below:

Stat Points:

Support: Stat Points = Bulk (HP/2.75 + Sp.Def + Def) divided by 30.
Strike (Physical): Stat Points = Attack divided by 10.
Strike (Special): Stat Points = Sp. Atk divided by 10.
Tech: Stat Points = Stat total across all six stats divided by 60.
Move Effect + Passive + Pokemon Tag Points:

A Sync Pair receives points for having various effects (such as Speed Up) in their kit, as well as Passives. See a link to the table describing how each effect is assigned points. (Warning: List is LONG)
